title: Noveron

'''Noveron''' was one of the yellow [[Star/Legends|suns]] located at the center of the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]]<ref name="PoG1" /> in the [[Mektrun Cluster/Legends|Mektrun Cluster]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> Along with its [[Binary star/Legends|twin]], [[Orell]], Noveron provided energy to all three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], [[Sileron]], [[Veron Minor|Veron]], and [[Trieron]].<ref name="PoG1" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
